title: Cooking for Ten People
content: When Olivia agreed to host dinner for ten people, she underestimated how much preparation the evening would require. The day before the gathering, she spent hours shopping for ingredients and organizing the kitchen. On the actual day, every surface quickly became covered with vegetables, pans, spices, and half-finished dishes. Although cooking for so many guests felt stressful at times, Olivia also enjoyed the energy and excitement of preparing a large meal. Fortunately, several friends arrived early and helped set the table and prepare desserts. By the time dinner finally began, everyone was hungry, tired, and laughing together. Despite the chaos, the evening turned out successfully.
